book_summary: Colossians 1-4 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. Verse-number alignment is preserved in both restored and mystical files. The book preserves Messiah as image of the invisible Divine, cosmic creator-context and reconciler, fullness dwelling bodily, warning against captivity to elemental powers and human decrees, new-human identity, love/peace/word indwelling, household-code safeguards, and gracious wisdom in speech.

chapters.notes: Thanksgiving, prayer for wisdom, rescue from darkness into Son's reign, image of invisible Divine, firstborn, all things created in/through/into Messiah, all things hold together, head/body, fullness dwelling, cosmic reconciliation, Messiah in you hope of glory.

Hearts knit in love, treasures of wisdom in Messiah, rooted/built up, warning against philosophy/empty deceit/elemental powers, fullness of deity dwelling bodily, circumcision of Messiah, baptism, hostile handwriting canceled, powers disarmed, food/festival/Sabbath judgment safeguard, holding fast the head.

Raised with Messiah, life hidden with Messiah, old/new human, status markers relativized in Messiah all and in all, compassion/kindness/humility/gentleness/patience, love as bond of completeness, peace ruling one body, word of Messiah dwelling richly, household code with domination safeguard.

Masters called to justice/equality under heavenly Master, persevering prayer, mystery of Messiah, wise walk toward outsiders, grace-seasoned speech, Tychicus and Onesimus, coworkers from circumcision, Epaphras prayer labor, Nympha's house-assembly, Archippus, remember my chains.

translation_notes: Colossians should preserve cosmic Messiah language without flattening it into abstract metaphysics detached from ethics.
Pleroma should be fullness; eikon image; prototokos firstborn; stoicheia elemental powers/principles; soma body/substance according to context.
Fullness of deity dwelling bodily in 2:9 is a key body-positive anchor.
Food, festival, new moon, and Sabbath language in chapter 2 must not be used as anti-Jewish contempt; the issue is judgment/disqualification in the Colossian context.
Household-code material must not sanctify domination, coercive parenting, or slavery. Read through new-human ethics, love, peace, no partiality, and heavenly Master accountability.
Onesimus is called trustworthy and beloved sibling; preserve dignity and connection to Philemon.
Nympha's house-assembly should be preserved as evidence of a woman-hosted assembly.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
Verse-number alignment must remain intact in both restored and mystical companion files.
next_actions: Begin next book according to project plan. Suggested next: 1 Thessalonians, to develop beloved community, holiness, resurrection hope, comfort, sober watchfulness, and peace practices.

Add glossary entries or reuse hooks: pleroma/fullness, eikon/image, prototokos/firstborn, stoicheia/elemental powers, soma/body-substance, head/body, new human, Messiah in you, and cosmic reconciliation.
